source: USACE Waterborne Commerce Statistics Center — Waterborne Transportation Lines of the United States (WTLUS), Volume 1: National Summaries
retrievalMethod: Retrieved MANUALLY once per year. The WCSC portal blocks automated tools (HTTP 403), so this is NOT part of the automated weekly PSIX refresh. Pull it via a normal browser, the W-DAPP tool, or a direct records request to WCSC.
howToUpdate: 1. Open sourceUrl in a normal web browser (automated tools get a 403).
2. In WTLUS Volume 1 (National Summaries), find the national vessel totals by type.

3. Enter the dry-cargo hopper barge total (open + covered) in counts.hopperBarge, the deck barge total in counts.deckBarge, tank barges in counts.tankBarge, and towboats/tugboats in counts.towboatTugboat.

4. WTLUS also tabulates towboats by horsepower class and barges by dimensions: fill towboatHpClasses and deckBargeSizeRanges as arrays of {label, count} buckets, matching however the tables bucket them (leave null if you skip them).
5. Set dataYear to the WTLUS calendar year and retrievedAt to today's date (YYYY-MM-DD).
6. Commit and push. Vercel redeploys, and the affected tabs (Hopper Barges, Deck Barges, Towboats, Tugboats) switch their gated charts to this data automatically.
Leave any value as null until you have the real figure — the app shows an 'awaiting WTLUS' notice for null values instead of inventing numbers.
